summary: Iteration 70 - Calendar DataTable Hook & React {en} Crash Fix Testing. All 7 test scenarios passed. The 4 Calendar-related CMS tables (GlobalEventsManager, MentorshipScheduleManager, MentorSlotTemplatesManager, BlockedDatesManager) now have working search/sort/pagination via useDataTable hook. The React '{en}' object crash fix on MemberLogin and MembershipEnrollment pages verified - brand names and placeholders render as plain strings.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings about span inside select/tbody - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: useDataTable hook properly exports DataTableToolbar, DataTablePagination, SortableTh components
All 4 calendar managers correctly use dt.visibleItems with row numbers calculated as (dt.page-1)*dt.pageSize + i + 1
MemberLogin.js wraps settings.brand_name in tt() function to prevent {en} object rendering
MembershipEnrollment.js wraps field placeholders and brand_name in tt() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 tested DataTable hook on 4 Calendar managers and React {en} crash fix. All calendar managers have working search/sort/pagination. Routes: /admin/calendar/global (GlobalEventsManager), /admin/calendar/mentorship (MentorshipScheduleManager), /admin/calendar/mentor-slot-templates (MentorSlotTemplatesManager), /admin/calendar/blocked-dates (BlockedDatesManager). Member login at /my-account/login, enrollment at /membership-enrollment. Note: /enroll route does NOT exist (returns 404).
